import io
import string
import list

let text = io.read_to_end()
let lines = string.split(text, "\n")
mut sum = 0
mut i = 0
while i < lines.len()
  match lines.get(i)
  when Some(line)
    let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
    if tokens.len() >= 2
      match tokens.get(1)
      when Some(tok)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(n)
          sum = sum + n
        when None
          ()
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
print("sum=#{sum}")
